en: So, do you recognize any of these men?
ko: 그래서, 이 사람들 중 아는 사람이 있나요?

en: I was hiding in the bathroom stall, so I didn't see his face, but I heard him.
ko: 저는 화장실 칸에 숨어 있어서 얼굴은 못 봤지만, 목소리는 들었어요.

en: He was singing along to the music at the bar.
ko: 바에서 음악에 맞춰 노래를 부르고 있었어요.

en: Do you remember what he was singing?
I think it was that song "I Want It That Way." Backstreet Boys. I'm familiar. Okay.
ko: "I Want It That Way"라는 노래였던 것 같아요. 백스트리트 보이즈요. 알고 있습니다. 좋아요.

en: Number one, could you please sing the opening to "I Want It That Way"? Really?
ko: 1번, "I Want It That Way"의 시작 부분을 불러주시겠어요? 정말요?

en: Number two, keep it going. The one desire.
Number three. Believe when I say.
Number four. I want it that way.
Tell me why. Ain't nothing but a heartache.
ko: 말해줘 왜. 그건 그저 가슴 아픈 일일 뿐.

en: Tell me why. Ain't nothing but a mistake.
ko: 말해줘 왜. 그건 그저 실수일 뿐.

en: Now number five. I never want to hear you say.
ko: 이제 5번. 네가 이렇게 말하는 걸 절대 듣고 싶지 않아.
